items.excerpt: We are using a form to capture the email address during data entry. We would like to use that email address as the emailto: portion of an automation. We are not seeing that as an option in the notification setup.

items.title: Add N/A option to Date field
items.excerpt: I’d like to be able to fill in a date field with “N/A”, so that I’m not second-guessing whether the date is not set yet (empty) or if I have already determined it’s not needed.

items.title: Add designed emails support
items.excerpt:
Today I can automatically send emails when a certain event is happening, I would like to add custom design to my automatic emails 
For example, add HTML support, maybe add emails template market place etc. 
Thanks

items.title: Adding Files To Emails
items.excerpt: Airtable allows files to be added as attachments to email templates and sent. Monday does not and requires a log in to download a file. This is AGGRAVATING! Any options out there to help?
